name: [GRIDHAND] Review Reputation Agent - New Google Review → AI draft response → post reply

gridhand.scenario: New Google Review → AI draft response → post reply
gridhand.description: When a new Google Review is posted for Joe's Auto Repair, a GRIDHAND workflow is triggered to help the owner, Joe, respond promptly and professionally. The workflow uses AI to draft a personalized response based on the review's content and sentiment, which is then reviewed and posted as a reply to the customer within 30 minutes, ensuring that positive reviewers feel appreciated and negative ones feel heard, ultimately boosting Joe's online reputation and attracting more customers to his shop. By automating this process, Joe can focus on running his business while maintaining a strong online presence and building trust with his community.
